content: interestingly, i think this is the first time patch notes will make me adjust my timeline
although i might reread gramona's story to see if i actually need to adjust it or if the recommendation is only for clarity
||any guesses on when g ramona decides to help keeper? If keeper dies does g ramona rewind? Assuming g ramona did rewind, does that mean keeper sucked so hard vs the moth that g ramona had to help?||

||i think keeper has gramona on mental speed dail but keeps forgetting to actually call her until they start running out of options (partially because gramona cant maintain her presence without borrowing ramonas body), but i dont think shes ever rewinded the current keeper.||
||an important factor of gramona's rewinding is that it typically only works on herself (and is closer to world hopping instead of actual time travel), so even if she did rewind, keeper would still be dead and she would be essentially working with another world's keeper||
this game’s lore is lowk cool
maybe one day I’ll go back and read <:wish:1356084702468899117>
